programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: Recidivist Callum Lynch sentenced to death is not executed.After a fake execution, he ends up in a secret laboratory.There he meets Rikkin and his daughter Sofia.Scientists have a mysterious device that allows them to access the records of ancestors' actions stored in their genes.The criminal is to connect with the consciousness of Aguilar from Spain, who lived during the Great Inquisition and obtained the Apple of Eden, which provides control over emotions.By using this item, you can supposedly eliminate aggression in people.The daredevil travels to the Middle Ages.He discovers that he is a descendant of a member of the Assassin secret society.Over time, he learns what a big mistake he made when he trusted Sofia and her father.

programme.title: Oscar's Eye
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Oscar cannot speak.Because of this, he is rejected and bullied by his peers.However, he becomes friends with the owner of the workshop, Eric, with whom he shares a common passion - photography.

programme.title: Wolfgang (extraordinari)
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, nine-year-old Wolfgang (Jordi Catalán), an exceptionally gifted boy with features on the autism spectrum, is forced to live with his father, Carles (Miki Esparbé), whom he has never met before.An orderly nine-year-old who strives for perfection cannot stand his father's chaotic lifestyle.He wants to escape to Paris to study at the Grimald Academy and become the best pianist in the world.When Carles discovers his plan, he must make the most important decision in his life: follow his dream of an acting career or sacrifice his plans and become the father Wolfgang really needs.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Bella Swan moves in with her father, who is the sheriff of a small town.At her new school, the teenager notices Edward Cullen.The unnaturally pale boy, who has the ability to read people's minds, is an inaccessible loner.Hoping that this will scare Bella away, Edward confesses to her that he is a vampire and that he and his entire family have been feeding on animal blood for centuries.This shocking truth does not discourage a girl in love.She and Cullen become inseparable.Their love, however, is threatened by a primal predatory instinct that is increasingly difficult for the boy to control.The couple is surrounded by wanderers hungry for human blood: Laurent, James and Victoria.The lovers face them.

programme.title: Challengers
programme.desc: Tennis player Tashi Duncan (Zendaya) has had impressive success on the court in the past.Her career was ended by an injury.Today, the woman is the trainer of Art Donaldson (Mike Faist) - her partner and father of her daughter.The man is one title short of the Grand Slam, but he is struggling with injury and age, which may ruin the pair's ambitions.After a series of defeats, the player plans to take part in the Challenger tournament in New Rochelle, New York, which is to be his warm-up before the US Open and a chance to regain his form.Unexpectedly, in the finale, Art will have to face Patrick Zweig (Josh O'Connor) - his childhood friend and Tashi's ex-boyfriend.The match becomes an opportunity for all three to confront their turbulent past.The film by Italian director Luca Guadagnino, the creator of the Oscar-nominated "Those Days, Those Nights", is a combination of a sports drama and a story about a love triangle.

credits.actor: US Open line Judge - Scottie DiGiacomo

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: An adventure-filled journey through a magical land begins.A quiet homebody, Bilbo Baggins has spent his entire life in an idyllic hobbit village.To his surprise, the wizard Gandalf offers him a trip to Erebor.The descendants of the dwarves who were deprived of their kingdom by the dragon Smaug, led by Thorin, intend to regain their former power.Gandalf says they need the help of an agile halfling.Bilbo is drawn into a whirlwind of extraordinary events.His team must face the numerous dangers that lurk in Middle-earth.The main role is played by the excellent Martin Freeman.The cast also included Ian McKellen and Richard Armitage.The three-time Oscar-nominated first part of the spectacular film adaptation of the novel "The Hobbit, or There and Back Again" by J.R.R.Tolkien.The action takes place 60 years before the events of "The Lord of the Rings".A real treat for fantasy lovers.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Three stories about man's pursuit of immortality.16th century.In the forests of South America, Spanish conquistador Tomas Creo (Hugh Jackman), head over heels in love with Queen Isabella I of Castile (Rachel Weisz), is looking for the legendary tree of life for her.The ruler wants to use them to finally solve the problem of the power struggle with a certain high-ranking cardinal.In the 20th century, scientist Tom Creo (Hugh Jackman) tries to find a cure that will save his seriously ill wife Izzi (Rachel Weisz).A man cannot come to terms with the fact that his beloved is dying.He decides to devote himself to finding a way to overcome death.Six centuries later, astronaut Tommy (Hugh Jackman) travels through space in a glass ball.He wants to reach the golden nebula, hoping to bring Izzi back to life.A science-fiction drama by Darren Aronofsky, author of "Requiem for a Dream", "Black Swan" and "The Wrestler".

programme.title: Tripped Up
programme.desc: Lizzy (Leah Lewis) has always dreamed of becoming a chef.However, participating in a culinary reality show and later working in a New York restaurant became a source of frustration for her.A cooking enthusiast is one step away from giving up her greatest passion.The last chance to stay in the catering industry is to participate in a culinary festival.Together with her friends, Mary (Ashley Moore), Kai (Ariel Winter) and Taylor (Sasha Fox), she sets off on an adventure.If she fails, she is ready to look for another path in life.Unfortunately, the team has been plagued by bad luck since the beginning of the expedition.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Creator
programme.desc: Future.There is a war going on between humans and artificial intelligence.Joshua, a former secret service agent, suffers after the disappearance of his pregnant wife Maya.He undertakes the task of tracking down and eliminating the elusive Creator - an architect of advanced technology whose invention may end the conflict or destroy humanity.The Creator's new work, called AlphaO, threatens an American battle station used to fight AI.Joshua and a team of elite agents go behind enemy lines.He hopes that during the mission he will be able to find his beloved, because he received information that the woman may be there.While traversing the darkness of the occupied area, he discovers that the new weapon he is to eliminate is artificial intelligence hidden in the body of a child.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: On the day of his fifth wedding anniversary with Amy (Rosamund Pike), Nick Dunne (Ben Affleck) reports to the police that his wife has disappeared in mysterious circumstances.The case of her disappearance quickly reaches the media.Detective Rhonda Boney (Kim Dickens) leading the investigation discovers numerous inconsistencies in the man's testimony.There are speculations that Nick may have had something to do with Amy's mysterious disappearance.Supported by his twin sister, Margo (Carrie Coon), the man desperately tries to prove his innocence.Over time, new facts come to light which show that the Dunnes' marriage was a toxic relationship.The film by the creator of the cult thriller "Seven", David Fincher, was nominated, among others,to the Golden Globe.For her role as Amy, Rosamund Pike received nominations for an Oscar, a Golden Globe and other awards.The film's script, also nominated for a Golden Globe, was based on the best-selling novel by Gillian Flynn.

programme.title: Gwyneth vs Terry: The Ski Crash Trial
programme.desc: After a ski slope accident, Gwyneth Paltrow was sued twice by retired ophthalmologist Terry Sanders.He claimed that he suffered from post-traumatic brain damage and trauma.

programme.title: Future Diva
programme.desc: A story about women with an unquenchable thirst for freedom who decide to work in the porn industry.Ilona is among them.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: The friendly bear Boguś, raised by humans, leads an idyllic life in the park, where he is a tourist attraction.One day, the teddy bear meets a one-horned deer, the mischievous Elliot, who is persuaded to go on a trip together and gets into trouble.Boguś's guardian decides that it is time for the bear to live in a natural environment.The animal cannot cope outside civilization at all.He can't find his way home either.Moreover, the hunting season is just starting.Carefree Elliot and his helpless companion are now in real danger.Together, they convince the forest inhabitants to join forces and oppose the armed newcomers.

programme.title: Bambi: A Tale Of Life In The Woods
programme.desc: Bambi the deer runs away from hunters and gets lost in the forest.The terrified toddler is found by a majestic deer - his father.Gradually, Bambi must grow up and learn the art of survival.

programme.title: Olivia And The Invisible Earthquake
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Olivia, together with her younger brother Tim and her mother, must suddenly leave their current apartment and start all over again in a strange neighborhood.Wanting to protect Tim from fear and alleviate his sense of loss, the girl tells him that their move is part of the film in which he is the main character.This challenge to their imagination helps them come to terms with difficult reality.Over time, through new friendships, fun, and even a bit of magic, the siblings discover that they can truly take responsibility for their story.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: Bella Swan (Kristen Stewart) celebrates her 18th birthday.The passing moments make her realize that she will one day grow old, while her boyfriend Edward Cullen (Robert Pattinson), who is a vampire, will always physically remain young.Despite this, the girl agrees to come to the party organized by the Cullen family.During her birthday party, Bella accidentally cuts her finger.At the sight of blood, one of the members of the vampire clan, Jasper (Jackson Rathbone), cannot stop feeling hungry.Unable to control himself, he attacks the girl.Edward saves his beloved, but decides not to put her in danger anymore.For her sake, he decides to leave the area.Before leaving, he tells Bella that he doesn't feel anything for her anymore.A lonely and betrayed teenager falls into depression.Only her acquaintance with a handsome Indian, Jacob Black (Taylor Lautner), helps her regain her balance.The boy falls in love with Bella, but hides his greatest secret from her.

programme.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programme.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
programme.desc: The hobbit Bilbo (Martin Freeman), Gandalf (Ian McKellen) and the dwarves led by Thorin (Richard Armitage) continue their dangerous journey.The goal of their expedition is to regain Erebor - the kingdom of the dwarves, which is currently occupied by the dragon Smaug (Benedict Cumberbatch).The travelers meet the bear warrior Beorn (Mikael Persbrandt), giant spiders inhabiting Mirkwood, the Wood Elves and their master, King Thranduil (Lee Pace), his son Legolas (Orlando Bloom), and the elf Tauriel (Evangeline Lilly).Thanks to an archer called Bard (Luke Evans), they get to Lake Town.When they reach the Lonely Mountain, they will come face to face with their greatest danger.The second part of the trilogy based on the novel by J.R.R.Tolkien.The film starred, among others: Ian McKellen ("Gods and Monsters"), Martin Freeman ("Fargo", "Sherlock") and Richard Armitage ("Versa", "Epicenter").The film, made on a grand scale, received three Oscar nominations, including for best special effects.

programme.title: Killer Heat
programme.desc: Greece.American Nick Bali (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) is hired to investigate the circumstances of the death of young shipping magnate Leo Vardakis (Richard Madden) in Crete.The deceased's sister-in-law, Penelope Vardakis (Shailene Woodley), does not believe the official police report.A private detective discovers that sunny landscapes hide many dark secrets and anyone can be a suspect.He discovers further facts about the rich and influential Vardakis family, as well as the brothers' complicated relationship.Adaptation of the story "The Jealousy Man" by Jo Nesbo.

programme.title: Wunderschöner
programme.desc: 50-year-old Nadine (Anneke Kim Sarnau) does everything to look young.When she discovers that her husband (Godehard Giese) is cheating on her, she falls into depression.The couple's daughter Lilly (Emilia Packard) is interested in the classes lectured by feminist Vicky (Nora Tschirner).Enno, the narrator's boyfriend, participates in the project of her new colleague Trevor (Malick Bauer).He doesn't know that his beloved will soon lose her head for him.Julie (Emilia Schüle), a new TV production manager, suffers from loneliness.Her difficult relationship with her co-worker increases her doubts about herself.Sonja (Karoline Herfurth) and Milan (Friedrich Mücke) go to family therapy.When it comes to light that the man has a new partner, the woman starts dating.

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: The dragon's bloodline
programme.desc: The history of House Targaryen.Its leader, Viserys I (Paddy Considine), ruler of the Seven Kingdoms, decides to break with tradition.The king appoints his daughter, Princess Rhaenyra (Milly Alcock and Emma D'Arcy), as heir to the Iron Throne.This step leads to the initiation of a conflict within the family, called the Dance of Dragons.After the ruler's death, the fratricidal fight breaks out with renewed force.Also taking part in it are:Rhaenyra's brother, Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney), and Alicent Hightower (Emily Carey and Olivia Cooke), the second wife of Viserys I. The events told in the series precede the action of "Game of Thrones" by 200 years.
